chief_complaint.text: What is your main health concern today?
chief_complaint.follow_up_prompt: Can you tell me more about what you are experiencing?

duration.text: How long have you been experiencing this?

severity.text: On a scale of 1 to 10, how severe is it, with 10 being the worst?

conditions.text: Do you have any existing medical conditions, such as heart disease, diabetes, or asthma?

routing_messages.escalate_911: This sounds like a medical emergency. Connecting you to a nurse right now. Please stay on the line.
routing_messages.er_urgent: This sounds urgent. Please go to an emergency room today. Do not wait.
routing_messages.walk_in: I recommend visiting a walk-in clinic today. You can find one near you at 811.ca.
routing_messages.home_care: This does not appear to be an emergency. Consider rest and over-the-counter remedies. If your symptoms worsen, call back or visit a walk-in clinic.
